tasks.title: Set up project structure and configuration
tasks.description: Initialize Vite + TypeScript project, configure vitest for jsdom, set up build output
tasks.definition_of_done: npm ci succeeds, npm run build runs without errors

tasks.title: Create types definitions
tasks.description: Define Direction, SerializedState, ReplayData, ReplayMetadata types
tasks.definition_of_done: All types compile correctly, used by all components

tasks.title: Implement GridState class
tasks.description: GridState: width, height, snake array, food position. Getters and setters. clone() method.
tasks.definition_of_done: GridState stores and retrieves snake segments and food position correctly

tasks.title: Unit test GridState
tasks.description: Test constructor, getters, setters, snake/food manipulation

tasks.title: Implement SnakeEngine.move()
tasks.description: move(direction, foodPos): moves head in direction, returns grew status, handles food collision
tasks.definition_of_done: Snake moves correctly in 4 directions, returns correct grew status

tasks.title: Unit test SnakeEngine
tasks.description: Test move in 4 directions, food collision detection, grew status

tasks.title: Implement CollisionDetector
tasks.description: checkWallCollision(), checkSelfCollision(), checkFoodCollision() methods

tasks.title: Unit test CollisionDetector
tasks.description: Test wall collision at all boundaries, self-collision, food collision

tasks.title: Implement FoodSpawner
tasks.description: spawn() returns random empty cell, never on snake, never outside grid
tasks.definition_of_done: Food spawns at random empty cells correctly

tasks.title: Unit test FoodSpawner
tasks.description: Test spawn on empty cells, never on snake, distribution randomness

tasks.title: Implement GameState class with score
tasks.description: score, speed (FPS), status, generation. incrementScore(), updateSpeed(), incrementGeneration(), reset()

tasks.title: Unit test GameState
tasks.description: Test score increment, speed calculation, status transitions

tasks.title: Implement InputHandler with direction buffering
tasks.description: Buffer arrow key input, validate direction (no reverse), process queue per tick
tasks.definition_of_done: Input buffering works, reverse direction prevented

tasks.title: Unit test InputHandler
tasks.description: Test buffering, reverse direction prevention, queue processing

tasks.title: Implement StateSerializer
tasks.description: serialize() captures GridState and GameState into compact JSON, deserialize() reconstructs
tasks.definition_of_done: States serialize and deserialize with no data loss

tasks.title: Unit test StateSerializer
tasks.description: Test roundtrip serialization, data completeness, size efficiency

tasks.title: Implement ReplayRecorder
tasks.description: recordTick() appends states, finishGame() wraps recording, localStorage persistence
tasks.definition_of_done: Games recorded and persisted to localStorage

tasks.title: Unit test ReplayRecorder
tasks.description: Test recording accumulation, finalization, localStorage read/write

tasks.title: Implement ReplayEngine
tasks.description: loadReplay(), play(), pause(), stop(), setSpeed(), getCurrentState()
tasks.definition_of_done: Replay playback works at all speed multipliers

tasks.title: Unit test ReplayEngine
tasks.description: Test playback progression, speed multipliers, state accuracy

tasks.title: Implement CanvasRenderer
tasks.description: drawGrid(), drawSnake(), drawFood(), drawGhostSnake(), clear(), pixel-to-cell conversion
tasks.definition_of_done: Canvas renders grid, snake, food, ghost without lag

tasks.title: Unit test CanvasRenderer
tasks.description: Test drawing methods (mock canvas), pixel-to-cell conversion

tasks.title: Implement TickScheduler
tasks.description: RAF loop, start(), pause(), resume(), step(), setSpeed(), coordinate game ticks
tasks.definition_of_done: Game loop runs at target FPS, pause/resume work correctly

tasks.title: Unit test TickScheduler
tasks.description: Test tick execution, timing, pause/resume state

tasks.title: Implement UIController event wiring
tasks.description: Wire New Game, Pause, Resume, Stop buttons; arrow key input; canvas rendering
tasks.definition_of_done: All UI controls functional, buttons respond

tasks.title: Implement replay list UI
tasks.description: Display completed games, scores, timestamps, delete buttons, selection
tasks.definition_of_done: Replay list displays and allows selection

tasks.title: Integrate ReplayEngine with live game
tasks.description: Allow simultaneous live game and ghost replay; ensure no collision
tasks.definition_of_done: Live and ghost games run independently on same canvas

tasks.title: Integration test: bit-exact replay verification
tasks.description: Record game, replay, compare state sequences

tasks.title: E2E test complete game flow
tasks.description: Playwright: start → move → eat → collision → end

tasks.title: E2E test replay playback
tasks.description: Playwright: select replay → play at speeds

tasks.title: E2E test live + ghost coexistence
tasks.description: Playwright: start replay → start live game → verify coexistence

tasks.title: E2E test input buffering and prevention
tasks.description: Playwright: rapid arrow keys → no reverse

tasks.title: Implement snake growth on food
tasks.description: Extend snake by 1 when food consumed

tasks.title: Implement speed increase with snake
tasks.description: Increment FPS by 1 per food, cap at 15

tasks.title: Implement game lifecycle states
tasks.description: Menu, Playing, Paused, Ended transitions

tasks.title: Implement Pause and Resume buttons
tasks.description: Wire pause/resume, preserve state

tasks.title: Implement Stop button
tasks.description: Stop halts game/replay, return to menu
tasks.definition_of_done: Stop ends game and shows menu

tasks.title: Implement Delete replay button
tasks.description: Delete from list and localStorage

tasks.title: Implement storage quota handling
tasks.description: Handle quota exceeded, warn user

tasks.title: Implement replay pause/resume
tasks.description: Pause and resume replay playback

tasks.title: Render ghost snake distinctly
tasks.description: Ghost snake faded (50% opacity)

tasks.title: Isolate collision logic
tasks.description: Ghost doesn't affect live logic
tasks.definition_of_done: No collision between live and ghost

tasks.title: Enhance input buffering
tasks.description: Buffer rapid key presses

tasks.title: Prevent direction reversal
tasks.description: Validate no reverse direction

tasks.title: Draw live snake and food
tasks.description: Render snake and food colors

tasks.title: Draw ghost snake on canvas
tasks.description: Ghost snake rendering

tasks.title: Unit test: snake growth on food
tasks.description: Test that snake grows by 1 segment when food consumed

tasks.title: Unit test: speed increases with growth
tasks.description: Test speed increases by 1 FPS per food, capped at 15 FPS

tasks.title: Unit test: game lifecycle states
tasks.description: Test state transitions: Menu→Playing→Paused→Playing→Ended

tasks.title: Unit test: pause and resume buttons
tasks.description: Test pause freezes game, resume continues from exact state

tasks.title: Unit test: stop button
tasks.description: Test stop clears game and shows menu

tasks.title: Unit test: replay list display
tasks.description: Test replay list shows scores, timestamps, sorted by newest

tasks.title: Unit test: delete replay button
tasks.description: Test delete removes replay from list and localStorage

tasks.title: Unit test: storage quota handling
tasks.description: Test quota exceeded error handling

tasks.title: Unit test: replay pause and resume
tasks.description: Test replay pause freezes animation, resume continues

tasks.title: Unit test: ghost snake renders distinct
tasks.description: Test ghost snake renders with faded opacity

tasks.title: Integration test: live and ghost coexist
tasks.description: Test live game and ghost replay run simultaneously without interference
tasks.definition_of_done: Live and ghost coexistence tests pass

tasks.title: Unit test: draw live snake and food
tasks.description: Test snake and food render with correct colors

tasks.title: Unit test: draw ghost snake
tasks.description: Test ghost snake rendering on canvas

tasks.title: Implement replay speed controls UI
tasks.description: Add speed multiplier buttons (0.5×, 1×, 2×, 4×) to replay playback
tasks.definition_of_done: Speed controls appear during replay and change playback speed

tasks.title: Ensure bit-exact replay accuracy in ReplayEngine
tasks.description: Verify deterministic replay uses seeded RNG for identical state sequences
tasks.definition_of_done: Replays produce identical states across multiple runs

tasks.title: Create HTML and CSS
tasks.description: Entry point, styling, initialization

tasks.description: npm run build succeeds

tasks.description: All tests pass
